notes: Populate with approved source photos only. Every production candidate must load the correct references for its product before generation and validation.

packaging_references.notes: Hero front packshot. Preserve logo mark, bottle geometry, cap shape/color, primary label architecture.
Secondary angle. Preserve side curvature, shoulder shape, and label wrap proportions.
Use when retail packaging is visible. Preserve bag/container silhouette, logo placement, label zones, and colorway.

root_references.notes: Morphology anchor. Preserve natural branching, taper, wrinkles, and age cues.
Secondary root angle. Preserve texture variation, asymmetry, and realistic surface fibers.

packaging_references.notes: Hero tea package. Preserve logo mark, tea box/pouch geometry, front label architecture, and core colorway.
Secondary reference. Preserve side panels, sachet/carton structure, and visible packaging hierarchy under softer lighting.
Hero powder packshot. Preserve pouch/container silhouette, logo mark, front label proportions, and color blocking.
Secondary powder angle. Preserve zipper/top edge, side gusset proportions, and realistic powder presentation.

root_references.notes: Optional realism anchor when powder scenes show roots or cut root pieces. Preserve believable fibrous texture and natural coloration.
